message:
fix(ufunc): propagate NaN in median, percentile, and quantile to match NumPy

NumPy propagates NaN in median/percentile/quantile: if any element is
NaN, the result is NaN. Add early NaN checks before sorting in both
the None-axis (full reduction) and Some-axis (per-lane) paths.
Previously, NaN values sorted unpredictably via total_cmp, producing
incorrect medians. Add tests for NaN propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
